title: Software Update - DFU - Charge Case at low battery - Software update tab in device settings
scenario: DFU is blocked with low battery popup when headset or charge case battery is below 5%
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Ensure the headset or charge case battery level is below 5%.
3. Navigate to Poly Studio Mobile → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
4. Locate and tap the Firmware Update (DFU) option.
5. Observe the app response when attempting to initiate the update.
expected: The app should display a popup message: "Update currently not available, please try back later". The DFU update should not proceed. The update should only become available once the charge case is plugged into power.
